text:
いつも思うんだけど、アンタ
やる気を出せば本当にスゴいね！

そこがアンタをウォッチする
楽しみでもあるんだけど……

ガンガン、ガシガシ攻めまくって
思わず私がうなるような探索
これからも期待してるわよ

You really are something when you've got that
fire roaring in you! Every time I see it, it
sticks with me for awhile.

That's part of the fun of watching you in the
first place, to be up front with you.

I'm looking forward to seeing you go do some
more fast-and-furious exploring that makes me
ooh and ahh!
